tasks.desc: Remove the cease and desist letter
Take the sheet music stand from the box
Clear the rest of the confetti
Some strange tracks here and there... right on the grass!
All the flowers have been trampled!
Some of the bushes have been eaten!
And some of the flowers, too!
What can eat a lawn like this?!
It seemed to go over here!
Need to screw this back on!
Good grief! What happened to this flowerbed?
I need to clean these tracks.
Looks like the beast broke these chairs!
I need to remove the broken chairs.
I need to fix the table, as well.
The hedge is destroyed! I have to fix it!
Did the beast lick the windows?!
Someone chomped on the curtain too?
And left muddy tracks on the entrance floor?!
Need to vacuum all these strange hairs...
It ate all of Grandma's knitting thread!
I need to tape this floor down again.
It broke some vases when it left!
It seems it took the door with it. Let's put it back.
How big is this thing? Let's measure its stride.
Hmm, the tracks seem to disappear here...
Now I got it! Had to cut down some grass.
And we are back on track! A well brushed track.
Some flowerpots seemed to be broken!
Did it get startled by this butterfly?
I need to saw some branches to progress here.
I can almost hear it! It's like it's eating something!
I almost see it, but it's just too dark!
Place the money in the bag
